# FORMA

> Quiet luxury shapewear sculpted in Nairobi for the modern woman.

FORMA is an East African shapewear brand founded in Nairobi, Kenya. We design
architectural compression garments — bodysuits, high-waist briefs, seamless
bras, and coordinated sets — crafted for diverse silhouettes with intentional
inclusive shading.

## Brand facts

- Founded: Nairobi, Kenya
- Ships: Worldwide
- Philosophy: Intentional design. Every seam serves a purpose. Every fabric
  choice honors the skin it touches.
- Specialty: Inclusive nude shades calibrated for darker skin tones; technical
  compression with editorial aesthetics.
- Sizing: Measurement-based, not standard label sizing. Hip measurement is the
  primary anchor.
- Payment: M-Pesa (via Pesapal) and major cards accepted.

## Product categories

- Sculpting Bodysuits — maximum-compression full-torso silhouettes
- High-Waist Briefs — anchor compression pieces engineered to disappear under
  clothing
- Seamless Bras — foundational support with zero visible structure
- Second Skin Sets — coordinated bodysuit + brief sets

## Collections

- New Arrivals — latest pieces from the FORMA atelier
- Best Sellers — most-worn silhouettes
- The Edit — quarterly curation of three silhouettes in three colorways

## Key pages

- Shop all: /shop
- Size guide (measurement-based): /size-guide
- Brand story: /about
- Editorial journal: /journal

## Contact

WhatsApp support available. Location: Nairobi, Kenya.
